## No-Copy Policy

This service references central packs; unpacked dump contents are not copied
into this repository. Generated fixture data created by Stream-B tests is local
test output and is removed or regenerated by the test harness.

## Fixture Materialization Policy

| generated_path | pack_id | command_or_fixture | cleanup | tests |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `working/test-pack-materialized/TP-COMMON/` | `TP-COMMON` | Stream-B fixture generation from central pack reference | Remove generated `working/test-pack-materialized/` after test run | `QT-*`, `T1-T3-LIVE-IDAM` |
| `working/test-pack-materialized/TP-INTEGRATION-EXAMPLES/` | `TP-INTEGRATION-EXAMPLES` | Stream-B/C fixture generation from central pack reference | Remove generated `working/test-pack-materialized/` after test run | `IT-MCP-CONFORMANCE`, `AT-HARNESS-A2A` |
